title: 931Kl9B0Keior5Vhq21Dfe2P9Qnrb5
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly China Report, newly released data has shown that China's manufacturing production increased on a year-on-year basis in August by 4.3% (manufacturing is defined as the creation or production of goods with the help of equipment, labor, machines, tools, chemical or biological processing, formulation, etc). While still fairly decent, this has marked a fourth straight month of lower growth and the lowest seen in over a year. China's manufacturing production growth last reached such a low level in July 2023.
